creator: bugs-freebsd-org916@ketas.si.pri.ee
text:
does abseil need portrevision bumps with protobuf now? this is recurring issue that generates multiple pr's and angers people who find no info that this dep might cause issues in their setups?

it's short tiny build on my really old machine and would not hurt if enforced? or at least we need note on this

i didn't found any note, wondered for days and now i might need to rebuild something again. future friendly note is highly appreciated to save time here
